seoTitle: Maclagan vs Macleay Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maclagan and Macleay Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maclagan vs Macleay Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maclagan and Macleay Island.
heading: Maclagan vs Macleay Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maclagan, Queensland and Macleay Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macleay Island has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Maclagan (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maclagan or Macleay Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maclagan has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Macleay Island scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maclagan scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Macleay Island scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maclagan or Macleay Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macleay Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
